Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk to NBA Hall of Famer Tracy McGrady to discuss how he became an NFL owner, why the '90s revolutionized basketball and returning to the NBA as an NBC analyst.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Sixth Street's Alan Waxman about taking a stake in the New England Patriots, international growth in the NBA and why a historic NWSL expansion fee paid off.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit down with Jess Pegula to talk about lobbying for change in the business of professional tennis and what she's learned from her parents.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on NBA Inside Stuff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Erika Ayers Baden, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, to discuss navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit for a special conversation with two titans, football coach Bill Belichick and Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, to learn their guiding principles for success.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Francine Lacqua visits Finland, where the threat from neighboring Russia looms large; she speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.
Video.grandparentTitle: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.
Video.grandparentTitle: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Former U.K. Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in strongmen.
Video.grandparentTitle: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Speaking to Christine Lagarde about Europe's economic travails, populism and how to lead through turbulent times.
Video.grandparentTitle: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Ajay Banga discusses his journey to becoming president of the World Bank Group; from his childhood in India to a career in the private sector and eventually leading a globally influential institution.
Video.grandparentTitle: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered; Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bloomberg Intelligence
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Focusing on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Balance of Power
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Carol Massar, David Gura. Bloomberg Television takes you behind the scenes of our award winning magazine "Bloomberg BusinessWeek"; Carol Massar and David Gura talk with the writers who break news on a weekly basis and get a lighter touch from the editor who oversees the Etc. section.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bloomberg Businessweek
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.
Video.grandparentTitle: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world. But a Bloomberg investigation reveals that several private hospital companies funded.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.
Video.grandparentTitle: Inside The Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With The West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.
Video.grandparentTitle: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents, said IM was more than.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
Video.grandparentTitle: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
Video.grandparentTitle: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
Video.title: Episode 1
